overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest path during golden hour. The character travels from a dense dark forest through a clearing with a thatched hut and continues toward a distant village.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path with thick canopy cover

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the shaded forest path surrounded by dense trees

entered.detail: thick overhead tree cover blocking most sunlight
large tree with thick trunk visible in the distance on the left
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
dense shrubs and grass lining the path

segments.scene_description: Walking through a densely wooded forest with limited sky visibility. The path is narrow and shaded by a thick canopy of trees, with underbrush lining both sides.

events.description: emerging from dense forest canopy into a clearing with a large tree and rustic hut

agents.ego_description: passing a large ancient tree and approaching a thatched-roof hut on the left

entered.detail: small wooden structure with straw thatching on the roof
low stone wall remnants alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a small clearing dominated by a large ancient oak tree and a rustic thatched-roof hut. Sunlight filters through more openly here, illuminating the dirt path and stone ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail approaching rural settlement

events.description: distant village buildings become visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sunlit path toward a distant village

entered.detail: cluster of thatched-roof structures visible on the horizon
vertical wooden posts marking the path boundary

segments.scene_description: The path continues through a more open forest with scattered pine trees and full sky visibility. Distant thatched-roof buildings of a village appear on the left and grow closer as the trail winds forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a shaded woodland into an open, sun-drenched rural landscape. It begins on a narrow path enclosed by a thick canopy and dense underbrush that limits visibility of the sky. As the trail progresses, the forest opens into a bright clearing where sunlight filters through an ancient oak tree to illuminate a rustic thatched-roof hut and scattered stone ruins. The scene then shifts into a more expansive woodland of scattered pine trees under a clear sky, before the path winds forward toward the distant thatched buildings of a village appearing on the left.
